og:description: Explore Chevalia Estate 2 at Grand Polo Club Resort. Luxurious villas for sale in Dubai — detailed specs, images & booking info.

Chevalia Estate 2 is an exclusive equestrian-themed luxury villa community by Emaar, located just minutes from key Dubai landmarks. It blends estate-style living with polo fields, private stables, and a luxury clubhouse, creating a unique lifestyle that combines sport, nature, and refined luxury.







Location




5 mins: Al Maktoum International Airport & The Oasis



10 mins: Expo 2020 site



30 mins: Downtown Dubai



Overlooks polo fields, clubhouse, stables, and linear parks








Configurations & Sizes



Villa TypeUnitsAvg. BUA (sq. ft.)Avg. Plot (sq. ft.)Starting Price (AED Mn)4 Bed Luxury744,1685,7947.88 Mn5 Bed Ultra Luxury245,0466,05710.03 Mn5 Bed Equestrian Luxury228,6359,14917.61 Mn



Total Units: 120 Villas







Design & Interiors




Contemporary architecture with equestrian-inspired elegance



Interiors finished with marble, fine wood, and refined textures



Large windows enhancing natural light & panoramic views



Villas designed for opulent yet functional family living








Community Features & Amenities




3 Polo Fields



Luxury Clubhouse



Private Stables & Riding School



Expansive Linear Park



Yoga platforms, fitness zones, cycling paths



Multisports court, picnic & BBQ areas



Petanque, open lawns, landscaped gardens
